myHealth
Features Download Demo What's new
Latest release · __VERSION__

Your family's health,
kept by you.

A private, offline-first family health companion. No account, no cloud, no server — your health data never leaves your device.

⬇ Download for your platform View on GitHub

Everything, nothing leaves your device

myHealth keeps your family's health record locally, encrypted, and entirely under your control.

👪

Profiles for the whole family

Track vitals, goals and medications per person — everything scoped to whoever you're looking at.

📈

Vitals & trends

Log weight, blood pressure, glucose and more; see trends charted against healthy reference ranges.

🎯

Goals with a projected ETA

Set a target and get a realistic, deterministic estimate from your own readings.

⏰

Gentle reminders

Water, daily tasks, medications and schedule blocks become on-device reminders — never nagging.

🧾

Medical documents

Store prescriptions, lab reports and insurance cards in an encrypted vault; scan & extract the key fields.

🆘

Emergency ICE card

A grab-and-go medical card — blood group, conditions, allergies and contacts — ready for an emergency.

🔐

Encrypted vault

Documents protected by a master password (Argon2id + Stronghold) and AES-256-GCM. No plain text, ever.

🧘

Guided movement

Downloadable yoga and exercise routines — receive-only, signed public content, no medical interpretation.

🔄

Sync over your own LAN

Sync between desktop and mobile directly over your own Wi-Fi — nothing is ever shared over the internet.

Download

Grab the installer for your platform. All assets for this version are attached to the __VERSION__ release.

PlatformFile
Windows.msi / .exe installer
macOS (Intel + Apple Silicon)universal .dmg
Android (experimental).apk (sideload) · .aab
iOS (experimental)unsigned build

⬇ Go to the latest release

Mobile builds are experimental and unsigned: the Android .apk is debug-signed (sideloadable, not production) and iOS is not yet code-signed.

See it in action

A quick walkthrough — adding a profile, logging a vital, and watching your trends come together. No setup, no account.

What's new in __VERSION__

Full notes also live on the release page.

Loading release notes…

No backend. No telemetry.

All data lives in a local SQLite database and an encrypted vault on your own machine. myHealth can't phone home — there's nowhere for it to call. The only network use is receive-only: pulling signed public reference content.

myHealth · __VERSION__ · GitHub
This site is generated automatically on each release.
